Description: USE MORE ARM!!!! ACCELERATE MORE QUICKLY!!!! DONT AGGRESSIVELY FLICK, BUT DONT PASSIVELY UNDERAIM!!!!!

Description: play high cm (48+) for arm control development

Creator: TRAGEDY
Description: Play on 600 dpi 0.435 sens (roughly 50 cm/360). focus primarily on moving your arm smoothly (but not too slowly) for larger range of motion movements while using your wrist and fingers for microcorrections. try to use minimal tension

Creator: TRAGEDY
Description: Focus on rensi technique and very fluid transition between initial flicks and microcorrections again. The higher fluidity you attain, even if you feel slower, the faster you feel. Precise scenarios for different type of reading skill.

Creator: TRAGEDY
Description: Focus on calm, slower initial flicks onto target in order to reduce overaiming issues and stay smooth in your tracking. Transition between flick and tracking should be nearly seamless with no obvious visual processing occuring.

Creator: TRAGEDY
Description: Focus on improving your intuitive ability to understand whether you are about to overflick or underflick in order to prepare the kind of microcorrection you will need. Try to start microcorrections faster and dont spend so long confirming.

Creator: TRAGEDY
Description: Strict velocity matching as well as calm recorrection onto target. Conscious moment when bot strafes to visually process how the target moved. Focus on good wrist smoothness and not locking your wrist and forearm.

Creator: TRAGEDY
Description: Focus on using a combination of wrist and arm movements for different ranges of motion as the ttarget changes movement patterns. Focus on fluidity between this change of arm part. Focus on reducing aggressive recorrections.

Creator: TRAGEDY
Description: All about click timing and fluidity between acquisition and microcorrections in dynamic clicking. Focus on landing on leading edge of target in its current path and relying on clicking timing to immediately click and move on.

Creator: TRAGEDY
Description: release tension as much as feasibly possible. actively think about removing tension in forearm and wrist as you complete flicks, prevent as much tension buildup as possible as scenario continues on. use 38 cm for tracking

Description: play between 30-45cm, always force more arm than comfortable with. bug chungud

Description: 30cm AT THE ABSOLUTE SLOWEST and EXCLUSIVELY FOREARM for larger range of motion (most of the time)
